LanguageData.StarStore_Bundle_Starter.label: Starter Pack
LanguageData.StarStore_Bundle_Starter.description: Contains basic resources and food, suitable for a newly founded colony.
LanguageData.StarStore_Bundle_Melee.label: Melee Combat Pack
LanguageData.StarStore_Bundle_Melee.description: A set of practical melee weapons and armor.
LanguageData.StarStore_Bundle_RandomMedical.label: Random Medical Supplies
LanguageData.StarStore_Bundle_RandomMedical.descripti: A supply pack randomly drawn from a pool of medical items.
